RETURN.description: sqrt(x^2 + y^2) avoiding intermediate overflow or underflow.
RETURN.assertion: assert Double.isInfinite(methodResultID) == (Double.isInfinite(args[0]) || Double.isInfinite(args[1])) || Double.isNaN(methodResultID) == (Double.isNaN(args[0]) || Double.isNaN(args[1])) || Math.abs(methodResultID - Math.sqrt(args[0]*args[0] + args[1]*args[1])) < 1e-9;
RETURN.content: sqrt(x^2 + y^2) avoiding intermediate overflow or underflow.

PARAM.description: second number to subtract from a
PARAM.name: b
PARAM.content: second number to subtract from a

PARAM.description: second number to subtract from a
PARAM.name: b
PARAM.content: second number to subtract from a

RETURN.assertion: assert (a >= b || a - b > Long.MIN_VALUE) && (a <= b || a - b < Long.MAX_VALUE);
assert methodResultID == (a >= 0 ? a * b <= Long.MAX_VALUE : a * b >= Long.MIN_VALUE);

RETURN.description: q such that a = q b + r with 0 <= r < b if b > 0 and b < r <= 0 if b < 0
RETURN.content: q such that a = q b + r with 0 <= r < b if b > 0 and b < r <= 0 if b < 0

RETURN.description: q such that a = q b + r with 0 <= r < b if b > 0 and b < r <= 0 if b < 0
RETURN.assertion: assert (args[1] > 0 && args[0] - (long)methodResult * args[1] >= 0 && args[0] - (long)methodResult * args[1] < args[1]) || (args[1] < 0 && args[0] - (long)methodResult * args[1] <= 0 && args[0] - (long)methodResult * args[1] > args[1]);
RETURN.content: q such that a = q b + r with 0 <= r < b if b > 0 and b < r <= 0 if b < 0

RETURN.description: r such that a = q b + r with 0 <= r < b if b > 0 and b < r <= 0 if b < 0
RETURN.assertion: assert methodResultID == (b > 0 ? a % b : a % b + b);
RETURN.content: r such that a = q b + r with 0 <= r < b if b > 0 and b < r <= 0 if b < 0
